what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text.
added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset.
No code symbols or executable content is present.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-faf15138.
The attachment_type is board_items, indicating a board cross-reference.
It belongs to the dragnet-development channel.
conventions: Attachment identifiers follow an att-* prefix.
Channel attachments are stored under channel-memory/channel_attachments/.
References external entities with a URI-style target.
notes: A metadata stub that records an attachment pointing to board item item-faf15138 in the dragnet-development channel.
